/tmp/codeql-scratch-04856982414da963/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/triangle.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/triangle.dir/examples/triangle.c.o -o triangle  libglfw_osmesa.a -lOSMesa -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so
